findings.issue: skills=[code-writing] but reviewers=[dev-code-reviewer, dev-test-reviewer] omit dev-security-auditor, which is part of the canonical code-writing default set.
findings.fix: Acceptable for a test-only task with no security surface, but if strict consistency is desired, either add dev-security-auditor or leave reviewers empty to fall back to defaults. The decision is reasonable as-is.

findings.issue: skills=[code-writing] but reviewers omit dev-security-auditor from the canonical code-writing default set.
findings.fix: Test-only task; deviation defensible. Add dev-security-auditor or empty the field for default fallback if strict consistency is required.

findings.issue: skills=[code-writing] but reviewers omit dev-security-auditor from the canonical code-writing default set.
findings.fix: Test-only debt task; deviation defensible. Optional: align with default set.

findings.issue: skills=[code-writing] but reviewers omit dev-security-auditor from the canonical code-writing default set.
findings.fix: Internal refactor task with no security surface; deviation defensible. Optional: align with default set.

findings.issue: Leftover template HTML comment '<!-- All details for task execution — technical, organizational, any other. -->' retained at the top of the Details section.
findings.fix: Remove the template comment (tasks 06/07 already removed it). Cosmetic only.

findings.issue: Leftover template HTML comment '<!-- All details for task execution ... -->' retained at the top of the Details section.
findings.fix: Remove the template comment for consistency with tasks 06/07.

findings.issue: PK and feature-artifact links use full repo-rooted paths (docs/features/.../...md, .claude/skills/...) while tasks 08/09/10 use relative paths (008-...md, ../../../.claude/...). Inconsistent link path style across the batch.
findings.fix: Pick one path convention for the batch. Not blocking — links resolve in their respective rendering contexts.

findings.issue: overview.md appears twice (once under 'Project knowledge', once under 'Code files (правка доков)') and architecture.md likewise. Mild duplication within the section.
findings.fix: Consolidate duplicate links or keep them — intentional here to mark which files are edit targets vs context. Cosmetic.
